title: marcorella colubrina
intro: Marcorella colubrina, also known as the serpent's tongue, is a flowering plant species native to South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Traditionally, Marcorella colubrina is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
